Southern Africa

Botswana Travel Guide

Best for travelers prioritizing exclusivity, strong guiding, and wilderness over checklist volume.

Destination guide to Botswana

Botswana is a high-value safari market built around the Okavango Delta, Chobe, and low-impact conservation-led travel.

Getting around

Routes often move through Maun, Kasane, and fly-in camp links rather than long public road circuits.

Best time to visit

May to October is the clearest safari season, with flood dynamics shaping the Delta experience.

Planning notes

Use this destination country page to compare attractions, understand how to move between them, and decide whether the trip works best as a standalone route or part of a broader regional circuit.

Destination at a glance

Botswana

  • 1 featured attractions listed
  • 1 active tour operator profiles
  • 1 accommodations nearby
  • 1 recommended restaurants

Attractions

Tourist attractions in Botswana

Each listing opens into a full independent attraction page with gallery, practical information, how to get there, nearby stays, restaurants, and booking links.

Image slot Attraction Okavango Delta

Botswana

Okavango Delta

One of Africa’s most exclusive safari ecosystems with mokoro channels and floodplain camps.

★ 4.9 (341) From $550
Northern Botswana
View Details

Tour operators

Tour operators active in Botswana

Botswana Journey Studio

A locally grounded tour operator active in Botswana, helping travelers combine attractions, stays, transport, and realistic route timing rather than selling disconnected components.

Country tours Transfers Private guiding Attraction booking support
Visit operator

Nearby stays

Accommodations near the main attractions

Image slot Stay Camp Okavango

Okavango Delta

Camp Okavango

A water-and-wilderness camp for travelers prioritizing mokoro channels, guided walks, and low-density Delta safari.

★ 4.8 (164) From $900 / night
Delta safari camp
View Details

Dining

Recommended restaurants near each attraction

Image slot Restaurant Camp Okavango Dining

Okavango Delta

Camp Okavango Dining

Okavango dining is normally included in the camp stay because there are no casual standalone restaurant circuits inside the Delta.

★ 4.5 (91) $$$$
Delta camp dining
View Details
